news.title: Trump Administration AI Strategy and Action Plan
news.summary: The US administration releases its AI strategy, asserting US leadership in AI and outlining action plans to maintain competitiveness.

news.title: Steam on Linux Usage Surpasses 5% for First Time
news.summary: Linux gaming market share on Steam has exceeded 5% in March 2026, marking a historic milestone for open-source gaming.

news.title: EmDash: Cloudflare's Spiritual Successor to WordPress
news.summary: Cloudflare launches EmDash as a modern WordPress alternative focused on solving plugin security issues.

news.title: Artemis II Launch Day: NASA Mission Updates
news.summary: NASA's Artemis II mission launch day updates — the first crewed lunar mission since Apollo.

news.title: DRAM Pricing Impact on Hobbyist Single-Board Computers
news.summary: Rising DRAM prices are significantly affecting the hobbyist SBC market, making devices less affordable.

news.title: IBM Announces Strategic Collaboration with Arm
news.summary: IBM announces strategic collaboration with Arm to shape the future of enterprise computing.

news.title: Mercor Cyberattack Linked to LiteLLM Compromise
news.summary: AI recruiting platform Mercor confirms cyberattack connected to the compromise of open-source LiteLLM project.

news.title: AI for American-Produced Cement and Concrete
news.summary: Meta's engineering team discusses AI applications for optimizing American cement and concrete production.

news.title: Ollama Adds Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, MiniMax Support
news.summary: Ollama expands its model support to include Kimi-K2.5, GLM-5, and MiniMax alongside existing DeepSeek, Qwen, Gemma models.

news.title: China AI Development: Tsinghua University 2026 Outlook
news.summary: Tsinghua University releases forward-looking analysis on China's AI development trajectory in 2026.
